speaker_query: I am worried that the sleep monitor will be uncomfortable and I may not be able to fall asleep tonight.
transcript: Patient asks whether the overnight sleep-monitoring device will cause discomfort and whether poor sleep during the test will invalidate the result.
communication_goal: Explain the purpose of the sleep-monitoring test, reassure the patient about tolerability, and give practical preparation guidance.

speaker_query: I forgot one step of the bowel preparation. Do I need to cancel the colonoscopy?
transcript: Patient reports missing part of the bowel-preparation process and asks whether the scheduled colonoscopy should be cancelled.
communication_goal: Clarify the missed preparation step, explain when the clinical team should be contacted, and avoid giving unsafe individualized instructions.

speaker_query: My child still has a fever after taking medicine. I am not sure when we should come back to the hospital.
transcript: Parent asks about persistent fever after medication and wants to know warning signs that require medical review.
communication_goal: Acknowledge parental worry, summarize fever-care principles, and identify red-flag symptoms that require timely clinical assessment.
